---
title : "Authoritative School Climate as a Context for Civic Socialization"
date : "2023-04-01"
author : "Encina, Yonatan; Berger, Christian & Miranda, Daniel"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "International Journal of Educational Development, 98 102752  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752)"
publication_short : "International Journal of Educational Development, 98 102752  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Encina, Yonatan; Berger, Christian & Miranda, Daniel (2023). *Authoritative School Climate as a Context for Civic Socialization*. International Journal of Educational Development, 98 102752  [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijedudev.2023.102752)

:::
